summary: This is a brief announcement post sharing materials from Jeff Atwood's presentation at the Raleigh MSDN Code Camp. The post provides a download link for his 'User Friendly Exception Handling Strategies' presentation, which includes PowerPoint slides and Visual Studio .NET 2003 demo solutions. Atwood expresses enthusiasm about connecting with fellow passionate developers at the event.
key_points: Atwood presented on user-friendly exception handling at the Raleigh Code Camp
Presentation materials were made freely available including slides and working code demos
The post reflects the early blogging culture of sharing conference materials with the broader community
money_quotes: There's nothing better than geeking out with a bunch of guys and gals who are as passionate about this stuff as you are!
key_insight: Developer community events create valuable opportunities for knowledge sharing that extend beyond attendees through freely shared presentation materials.
